name: 1.8bu Hip Hugger Laundry Basket Gray - Brightroom™
description:
From bath towels to clothes and more, this 16.8-Gallon Hip Hugger Bushel Laundry Basket from Brightroom™ helps keep your essentials nicely organized. This rectangular laundry basket features an allover cut-out design with an open top for a standout look and easy stashing of contents. Made with plastic, this gray laundry basket is easy to fit along the wall or in a closet.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
